mapper.insert:
insert into wecom_customer ( cust_id, cust_name, cust_avatar, create_time, update_time ) values
( #{item.custId}, #{item.custName}, #{item.custAvatar}, now(), now() )
on duplicate key update cust_name = values(cust_name), cust_avatar = values(cust_avatar), update_time = now()
mapper.select: select cust_id from wecom_customer where cust_id is not null and cust_id != ''
